title: Competitors and suppliers
summary: 9609 A Level — competitive environment and supply chain power.
learningObjectives: Apply Porter's five forces at overview level.

simpleExplanation.title: Market forces around the firm
simpleExplanation.summary: Competitors fight for share; powerful suppliers or buyers squeeze margins. Firms must monitor both.

sections.content: **Competitors and suppliers** (6.1.5) extends PESTLE into **micro environment**. Name **actual rivals** from cases.
